analysis.short_title: Global Feature Importance for Class: Healthy
analysis.markdown:
This is a horizontal bar chart titled "Global Feature Importance for Class: Healthy". The x-axis represents the "mean(|SHAP value|)" ranging from 0.00 to 0.10. The y-axis lists six features: Zaeta, Beta, Theta, Alpha, Gamma, and Delta. Each bar corresponds to a feature and is labeled with its specific SHAP value at the end of the bar.

| Feature | SHAP Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| Zaeta | +0.1 |
| Beta | +0.07 |
| Theta | +0.05 |
| Alpha | +0.04 |
| Gamma | +0.02 |
| Delta | +0.01 |
visible_text: Global Feature Importance for Class: Healthy
